hooks.command: jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"amplitude-event-mapper is read-only by design. Slack write tools are denied. See CLAUDE.md."}}'

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"amplitude-event-mapper is read-only by design. Atlassian write tools are denied. See CLAUDE.md."}}'

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"amplitude-event-mapper is read-only by design. Google Workspace write tools are denied. See CLAUDE.md."}}'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s\n' "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(bash )?[^ ;|&]+/bin/smoke-test\.sh( [^ ;|&]*)?$|^touch projects/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/APPROVED$|^ls projects/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/?$|^cat projects/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+\.md$|^diff projects/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+\.md examples/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/expected/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+\.md$'; then exit 0; else jq -n --arg cmd "$CMD" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("amplitude-event-mapper denies arbitrary Bash. Allowed: bin/smoke-test.sh, touch APPROVED, ls/cat/diff in projects/. Got: " + $cmd)}}'; fi
